message:
feat(gateway): update all routes to use canonical response envelope

Standardize all REST API endpoints to use the Stripe-inspired response
envelope pattern with object type, data payload, and request ID.

Updated route files:
- accounts, alerts, beads, conflicts, context, dcg, health
- history, mail, metrics, reservations, ru, utilities

Changes:
- Replace c.json() calls with sendResource, sendList, sendCreated
- Use sendNotFound for 404s with proper error codes
- Use sendValidationError for validation failures
- Use sendError and sendInternalError for other error types
- Fix TypeScript exactOptionalPropertyTypes errors

Test updates:
- Updated all route tests to expect canonical envelope format
- Changed from body.field to body.data.field
- Added checks for body.object and body.requestId

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
